channel.title: AI on Kanch's Cloud Race Musings
channel.description: Recent content in AI on Kanch's Cloud Race Musings

item.title: Don't Just Chat, Charm: Crafting Virtual Agents with Personality
item.description: How to build conversational agents that go beyond basic chatbots to deliver engaging user experiences.

item.title: A Typology of AI Agents
item.description: Classifying agent architectures by complexity, from simple reflex agents to fully autonomous systems.

item.title: WTH are AI Agents?
item.description: Breaking down what AI agents really are and how they work under the hood.

item.title: AI Agents 101
item.description: How generative AI application patterns evolved from foundation model calls to autonomous multi-agent systems.

item.title: Generative AI and LLMs - Excitement and Panic
item.description: A primer on what Generative AI and LLMs are, the history, key players, enterprise impact, and the controversies surrounding this space.

item.title: Prompt Engineering 101
item.description: Getting started with prompt engineering techniques for large language models.

item.title: This Week with Generative AI
item.description: Weekly roundup of developments in the Generative AI space.
